posts.author: automate (Erin Lenhardt)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve setup the following scenario in Make.com in order to accomplish the following:

  1. Watch for an item’s name to be updated
  2. Then create a google drive folder with the same name
  3. Then update that same item with a link to that google drive folder in the item’s file column.

it executes well, except all I get in the file column is a picture of a file and when I click into it, there is no link at all. What am I doing wrong?

Screenshot 2024-08-18 at 8.42.59 PM2426×812 96.8 KB

Screenshot 2024-08-18 at 8.43.28 PM986×1632 101 KB
